ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：你会得知该玩家当晚提交的咒语，并以原名称提交一个新的能力效果。该咒语会成为今晚首条施放的咒语，然后该施法者死亡。
otherNightReminder: Ask the Infernus to choose a player. Tell the Infernus the full text (and name) of the Spell and ask them to rewrite it to their liking. Then after Ritual, kill that player and place a "Dead" token on them.
